title: Configure nginx for monitor.mtzcg.com to Grafana
description: monitor.mtzcg.com currently goes to main website instead of Grafana dashboard. Need to create nginx server block to proxy monitor.mtzcg.com to localhost:3001 (Grafana)
notes: Changed Cloudflare DNS record from Proxied to DNS-only. This allows direct connection to nginx which routes to Grafana. DNS propagation takes 1-5 minutes."

title: Test and verify Riemann monitoring system
description: Riemann containers are running (riemann-server, riemann-influxdb, riemann-grafana). Need to verify they're collecting metrics and dashboards are working properly.
notes: Backup monitoring FIXED ✅ - Now detecting 2 backups, health score 0.79. Docker monitoring NEEDS WORK ⚠️ - system-monitor.py requires venv activation, startup script updated but not yet working. See /home/tmb/mtzion/riemann/RIEMANN-MONITORING-FIXES.md for details.

title: Review and test Alfresco backup scripts
description: Backup scripts exist in /home/tmb/mtzion/mtz-admin (backup-database.sh, backup-contentstore.sh, backup-full-improved.sh, etc.). Need to review configuration and test that backups work with current Alfresco setup.
notes: Successfully migrated backup scripts to Babashka. Created alfresco-backup.clj and alfresco-backup-config.edn. Script follows Alfresco best practices (Solr → Database → Contentstore → Config order). First backup completed successfully: 8.7 GB compressed archive with 2,281 contentstore files. Backup location: /home/tmb/mtzion/alfresco-backups/daily/

description: Riemann has backup-monitor directory and configuration. Need to integrate backup monitoring so Riemann alerts when backups fail or are stale.

title: Set up automated backup schedule
description: Create cron jobs to run Alfresco backups automatically (daily database, weekly full backups). Configure retention policies.

title: Set up automated daily Alfresco backups
description: Configure cron job to run Babashka backup script daily. Script is at /home/tmb/mtzion/mtz-admin/alfresco-backup.clj. Retention policy keeps 7 daily backups (already configured in script). Need to schedule nightly backups during low-traffic period.
acceptance_criteria: Cron job scheduled, logs showing successful daily backups, old backups automatically cleaned up per retention policy
notes: Cron job added: 0 2 * * * cd /home/tmb/mtzion/mtz-admin && bb alfresco-backup.clj backup. Logs to /home/tmb/mtzion/alfresco-backups/logs/cron.log. Note: Old backup script at /home/tmb/Admin/backup-scripts/backup-full.sh also runs at 2:00 AM - consider removing to avoid conflicts.

title: Remove or update old Alfresco backup cron jobs
description: Old backup scripts still running: 1) /home/tmb/Admin/backup-scripts/backup-full.sh at 2:00 AM daily, 2) cleanup-old-backups.sh at 3:00 AM weekly. New Babashka backup handles both backup and cleanup. Consider disabling old scripts to avoid conflicts and duplicate backups.

title: feature
description: Update feature card system to intelligently render based on what content exists in each feature folder: Graphic only (display just image), Text/HTML only (display just text), Both (display graphic with text below)
design: Detection logic: Check if feature has children (images) and cm:content. Render accordingly: has-image+has-content (image top, text below), has-image only (full-height image card), has-content only (text-only card), neither (placeholder)
acceptance_criteria: Feature card component detects available content, graphic-only cards display full-height image, text-only cards display with styled background, cards with both show image+text
notes:
Implemented smart rendering logic:
- feature-card now detects content type (has-image, has-text, both, neither)
- feature-card-image-only: Full-height image (1200px) with optional title overlay
- feature-card-text-only: Text-focused card with gradient background
- feature-card-image-and-text: Standard layout (900px image + 300px text)
- All variants maintain same height (1200px) for consistent grid
- Hover effects and transitions on all card types
Ready for testing on homepage

title: Implement Alfresco renditions for responsive image sizing
notes: ✅ COMPLETE: 1) Image-only: just image, not clickable. 2) Image+HTML: image + description from IMAGE NODE (cm:description) as teaser, clickable to full article. 3) HTML-only: text card, clickable. Uses :feature/content to detect HTML node. Ready for testing!

title: Fix MCP write_content tool - HTML file upload failing
notes: ✅ FIX APPLIED! Replaced broken content_utils.upload_file() with direct httpx REST API calls (following alfresco-agents-lab-clive pattern). Changes: 1) Create cm:content node via POST /nodes/{folderId}/children, 2) Upload HTML stream via PUT /nodes/{nodeId}/content. File: python-alfresco-mcp-server/alfresco_mcp_server/tools/core/write_content.py lines 186-251. NEXT: Test from Claude Desktop.
